before_problem: The Isaac Sim setup split 'concrete' as 'con- / crete'.
The framework phrase split 'InternNav' as 'Intern- / Nav'.
The gate-chain prose split conversion-related wording, including 'no-MDL con- / version'.
Follow-on page-1 wording also exposed splits such as 'preserva- / tion', 'preser- / vation', and 'usabil- / ity'.
rejected_intermediate_problems: A short gate-chain rewrite removed some target splits but introduced 'vis- / ible', 'com- / pares', and 'ref- / erence'.
A numbered-gate rewrite introduced 'Sec- / ond' and 'un- / der'.
Adding the MDL expansion first produced 'Material Definition Lan- / guage' and then 'Defi- / nition'.
The accepted version protects only 'Definition' with an mbox and keeps the rest of the paragraph in normal justified body text.

change_summary.summary: Rewrote the page-1 Introduction setup and gate-chain paragraph with shorter ACL-style sentences, restored an MDL expansion, protected 'Definition' from a bad linebreak, and kept the evidence boundary as four separate gates.

observations: The final page-1 text layer removes the targeted Introduction splits around concrete, InternNav, conversion, visible, compares, reference, second, under, material, audit, and Definition.
The final first-page prose preserves the MDL expansion as 'Material Definition Language' without splitting 'Definition'.
The final gate-chain paragraph remains a bounded evidence summary rather than a broad conversion or embodied-benchmark claim.
The final contact sheet remains 11 pages with no obvious float, table, or blank-page regression.

verification.command: bash -c 'if rg -n "Overfull|LaTeX Warning: Label|There were undefined references|Undefined control sequence|multiply-defined|Rerun to get cross-references right|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log; then exit 1; else printf "no blocker matches\n"; fi'

verification.result: ok true; title and abstract match metadata; abstract word count 168
